name: Layered Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can Black beans (15 oz); rinsed and drained
1 ½ cup Shredded cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese
¼ cup Sliced pitted black olives
¼ cup Green onion, finely chopped
1 can Chopped green chili peppers (4 oz); drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2 ½-quart glass salad bowl, layer black beans, lettuce, tomato, cheese, olives, and onions.
2. For the dressing, in a medium bowl, stir together avocado dip, sour cream, chili peppers, milk, garlic, and chili powder until well combined.
3. Spread the dressing evenly over the top of the salad.
4. If desired, sprinkle chopped tomato on top.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for 2 to 24 hours.
6. Before serving, toss the salad together and serve over crushed tortilla chips.
